languages.text: {n}Глифы оживают, быстро изменяя последовательность. Откуда-то из недр установки доносится низкий гул, после чего составные части чудовищного механизма тяжело расступаются в стороны, являя вашему взгляду силовой контур.{/n}

{n}The glyphs come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Глифы оживают, быстро изменяя последовательность. Откуда-то из недр установки доносится низкий гул, после чего составные части чудовищного механизма тяжело расступаются в стороны, являя вашему взгляду силовой контур.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The glyphs come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

{n}The glyphs next to the button come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

{n}The glyphs next to the button come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

{n}The glyphs come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ボタンの横の記号が動き出し、次々に変化していく。機械の奥深くに何かが唸り、巨大な機構の部品が重く割れ、その内部の回路が目に映る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The glyphs next to the button come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ボタンの横の記号が動き出し、次々に変化していく。機械の奥深くに何かが唸り、巨大な機構の部品が重く割れ、その内部の回路が目に映る。

languages.text: {n}Los glifos cobran vida y cambian de secuencia rápidamente. Un temblor grave emerge de las profundidades de la máquina, cuyos componentes se separan, revelándote el circuito de energía.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The glyphs come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los glifos cobran vida y cambian de secuencia rápidamente. Un temblor grave emerge de las profundidades de la máquina, cuyos componentes se separan, revelándote el circuito de energía.{/n}

languages.text: {n}符文仿佛活了过来，序列飞速变换。机器深处传来低沉的轰鸣。随后，这怪诞机械的组件沉重地裂开，将能源回路展现在你眼前。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The glyphs come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}符文仿佛活了过来，序列飞速变换。机器深处传来低沉的轰鸣。随后，这怪诞机械的组件沉重地裂开，将能源回路展现在你眼前。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Glyphen erwachen zum Leben und wechseln rasch ihre Sequenz. Ein dumpfes Grollen ertönt aus den Tiefen der Maschine, ehe sich die Komponenten des monströsen Mechanismus teilen und den Blick auf dessen Stromkreise freigeben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The glyphs come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Glyphen erwachen zum Leben und wechseln rasch ihre Sequenz. Ein dumpfes Grollen ertönt aus den Tiefen der Maschine, ehe sich die Komponenten des monströsen Mechanismus teilen und den Blick auf dessen Stromkreise freigeben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Glifler canlanıyor, hızla sırayı değiştiriyor. Makinenin derinliklerinden bir yerden alçak bir gürleme geliyor, ardından da canavarca mekanizmanın bileşenleri ağır bir şekilde birbirinden ayrılarak güç devresini gözlerinizin önüne seriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The glyphs come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Glifler canlanıyor, hızla sırayı değiştiriyor. Makinenin derinliklerinden bir yerden alçak bir gürleme geliyor, ardından da canavarca mekanizmanın bileşenleri ağır bir şekilde birbirinden ayrılarak güç devresini gözlerinizin önüne seriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les glyphes s'animent et changent rapidement de séquence. Un grondement sourd vous parvient des entrailles de la machine, puis les composants du mécanisme monstrueux se séparent avec lourdeur pour révéler le circuit d'alimentation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The glyphs come to life, quickly changing sequence. A low rumble comes from somewhere in the depths of the machine, and then the components of the monstrous mechanism heavily split apart, revealing the power circuit to your eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les glyphes s'animent et changent rapidement de séquence. Un grondement sourd vous parvient des entrailles de la machine, puis les composants du mécanisme monstrueux se séparent avec lourdeur pour révéler le circuit d'alimentation.{/n}
